entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: 'University_Name' → 'Country'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key 'University_Name' → University_Name entity. Second-level key 'Country' → Country entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (University_Name) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Country). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014" (and 2 more). Attach remarks columns ['University_Name', 'Country'] as metadata properties on the leaf entity.
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key 'University_Name' defines the root entity (University_Name).
Second-level key 'Country' defines child entities (Country) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
prompt_context: 这个表格包含大学的性能评分数据。每一行代表一个University实体，由University_Name和Country唯一标识。表格中的2011-2016列包含该大学在各年份的性能评分（数值范围90-96）。提取时应创建University实体节点，然后为每个年份创建HAS_PERFORMANCE_METRIC关系，将year和score作为关系属性。Country应作为University实体的属性而非独立实体。不需要为年份或数值创建单独的实体节点。

extraction_rules.subject_extraction: Each row represents a University entity identified by the composite key of University_Name and Country columns.
extraction_rules.value_extraction: Numeric values in columns 2011-2016 represent performance metrics (scores) for each year. Extract as relation attributes with year as the time dimension and numeric value as the metric amount.
extraction_rules.time_handling: Year columns (2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016) are encoded as relation attributes. Each year-value pair is extracted as a separate relation instance with year and score attributes.
extraction_rules.hierarchy: No parent-child hierarchy detected. Country serves as a geographic attribute of the University entity rather than a hierarchical parent.
extraction_rules.remarks: No remarks column present in this dataset.
